allow: Bash(NODE_ENV=test DB_HOST=localhost DB_PORT=5433 DB_USER=test DB_PASSWORD=test DB_NAME=lista_compras_test JWT_SECRET=test-secret APP_URL=http://localhost:3000 GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=test GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET=test GOOGLE_CALLBACK_URL=http://localhost:3000/auth/google/callback npx jest tests/integration/migrations.test.js --no-coverage)

Bash(NODE_ENV=test DB_HOST=localhost DB_PORT=5433 DB_USER=test DB_PASSWORD=test DB_NAME=lista_compras_test JWT_SECRET=test-secret APP_URL=http://localhost:3000 GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=test GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET=test GOOGLE_CALLBACK_URL=http://localhost:3000/auth/google/callback node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\({path:'.env.test'}\); const {getTestDb,migrate,rollback} = require\('./tests/helpers/dbSetup'\); async function main\(\){ const db = getTestDb\(\); try { const r = await db.raw\('SELECT 1 as ok'\); console.log\('DB OK', r.rows[0]\); } catch\(e\) { console.error\('DB ERROR', e.message\); } await db.destroy\(\); } main\(\);")
